title: oxytropis neglecta subsp. occidentalis
intro: Oxytropis neglecta subsp. occidentalis is a plant species within the pea family, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues. The medicinal properties of Oxytropis neglecta subsp. occidentalis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, and it has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits, including immune system support and antioxidant activity.
